⛔ DOCUMENTATION POLICY FOR AI ASSISTANTS ⛔

This project maintains EXACTLY 11 markdown files:
- 1 in root (README.md)
- 9 in docs/ 
- 1 in analysis/

DO NOT CREATE:
❌ CHANGELOG_*.md
❌ QUICK_START_*.md
❌ IMPLEMENTATION_*.md
❌ MIGRATION_*.md
❌ REFACTORING_*.md
❌ TRAIT_SYSTEM_*.md
❌ Any other .md files

IF YOU FIND FILES LIKE THIS:
1. DELETE them immediately
2. Update docs/INDEX.md if needed
3. Verify count: (Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter "*.md").Count = 11

TO ADD CONTENT:
✅ Update existing files in docs/
✅ Add sections to ARCHITECTURE.md, UI_GUIDE.md, etc.
✅ DO NOT create new files

See docs/INDEX.md for complete policy.
